title: Subject to appropriation
doc_html:
§563.3. Subject to appropriation

            The implementation of this Chapter shall be subject to the appropriation of funds by the legislature for this purpose.

            Acts 2023, No. 460, §1, eff. July 1, 2024.
doc_text:
§563.3. Subject to appropriation
The implementation of this Chapter shall be subject to the appropriation of funds by
the legislature for this purpose.
Acts 2023, No. 460, §1, eff. July 1, 2024.
